title: Goblin Traders: Mythic Metals Addon
description: Adds Mythic Metals to Goblin Trader's trading offer.
body:
## Overview This data pack enables the Goblin trader to trade with Mythic Metals items.

Goblin traders' offer depends on the variant.
Normal goblins trade with overworld metals, (tin, silver) while the vein goblins; nether metals (midas gold, stormyx)
At first, the addition of an Alloy Forge and trade limits may make the raw ore trades redundant, it does give you experience and save you some fuel for elsewhere.

Rare crafting material can be traded with a lot of emeralds with a single block of their corresponding material (Banglum block for a banglum chunk)

### Installing Drop the data pack file into the `datapacks` folder inside your world. ## Trades Here are the trades that you're gonna expect after installing this data pack.
Goblin Trader
Common | Input | Output | Max | Exp | |--- |--- |--- |--- | | 32 Cobbled Deepslates | 1 Morkite | 24 | 10 | | 1 Raw Tin | 2 Tin Ingots | 30 | 10 | | 1 Raw Silver | 2 Silver Ingots | 30 | 10 | | 1 Raw Manganese | 2 Manganese Ingots | 30 | 20 | | 1 Raw Quadrillum | 2 Quadrillum Ingots | 30 | 20 |
Uncommon | Input | Output | Max | Exp | |--- |--- |--- |--- | | 1 Raw Copper
1 Raw Tin | 2 Bronze Ingots | 30 | 30 | | 1 Raw Quadrillum
1 Raw Manganese | 2 Quadrillum Ingots | 30 | 30 | | 1 Raw Iron
1 Coal | 2 Steel Ingots | 30 | 30 |

1 Aquarium Block | 1 Aquarium Pearl | 2 | 80 | | 32 Emeralds
